prompts:
I got updated information for Databricks Coding Interview: Databricks Coding Interview : Workspace Environment & Setup
Can use existing Azure Databricks workspace instead of Free Edition
Multiple workspace accounts to be prepared as backup options
AI Tools & Screen Sharing Approach
Two-screen setup confirmed acceptable
Terminal/coding agent on one screen
Databricks workspace on second screen
Share both screens simultaneously during the interview. So the interviewer can see how I use agent to build. 
Interview Format & Scope
Problem statement details:
Three available prompts (retail, media, one other vertical)
No financial services specific scenarios
Interviewer selects prompt at start of session
Single paragraph/prompt format
Data generation requirements
Create synthetic dataset using AI tools - must be Pyspark. 
Target ~100k rows initially
Focus on working dataset 
Technical Requirements & Evaluation Focus
PySpark strongly preferred over SQL for dataset creation
Previous candidates dinged for SQL-only approach
All customer work uses PySpark in production
SQL acceptable for other objects (dashboards, tables, medallion layers)
Scaling discussion expected
“What if million rows instead of 100k?”
Distributed systems concepts
Performance and scalability reasoning
Not just data volume but production considerations
Showcase capabilities appropriately
Chat through code and explain what it’s doing
Go deeper if knowledgeable, but avoid unfamiliar territory
For example, don’t attempt MLflow or advanced features without expertise
